name: List
description: Vertical list of rows. Six sub-components share one anatomy and diverge on the leading slot, the selection contract, and the expand contract: `text` (display / navigation rows), `radio` (single-select picker with leading 16px radio indicator), `image` (avatar-anchored rows with leading 40px [Thumbnail](../thumbnail/thumbnail.md) image — single density at the 40 rung, optional `supportingText` second line + optional trailing affordance per row), `entry` (directory-entry rows with selectable 32 / 40 / 48 / 56 leading Thumbnail via `size="small|medium|large|xlarge"`, identity group of label + optional inline `count` Badge + optional stacked `secondary` line, and an optional single-line `description` below — the canonical home for every entity-row case: follow suggestion, member directory, subscription / channel / topic / playlist directory), `nav` (drill-in rows with auto-rendered trailing chevron), `accordion` (expandable rows with auto-rendered trailing chevron that rotates on expand, hosting a content body and optional nested `<List embedded>` group below the trigger).
wrapperGuidance: Owns its inline padding internally. Place as a direct child of the page-shell <main> (or any host that pays the gutter once). Do NOT wrap in a padding-inline div, className="px-*", or style={{ padding }} — the page rail is paid once at the shell, never on the full-bleed child. Inside a bounded surface (Dialog / BottomSheet / SideSheet), apply the negative-margin opt-out — see AGENTS.md § Composition rules.

chrome.padding: row-level inline + block via list-row anatomy

standalone.context: Direct child of the page shell or any host that pays the page-rail gutter once.

embedded.trigger: prop `embedded={true}` on <List /> OR direct child of `.chorus-section` / `.chorus-feed` (DOM-ancestry safety net).
embedded.context: Composed inside another rail-responsible host. Rows take over from the host's content-box edge; leading thumbnails / radios align with the host header's left rail.
